scope: Telegram group Agent Room surface only. Private/user notification policy is separate.

agent_room_group.purpose: shared collaboration, disagreement, evidence, decisions, and visible mechanism evolution
agent_room_group.not_purpose: personal notification inbox, raw runtime log stream, private task delivery, secret/account/security discussion

private_to_alex.note: Out of scope for this policy except when group content must be suppressed or moved private for sensitivity.

log_only.purpose: routine heartbeats, internal runner metadata, non-material retries, duplicate details

allow_visible_group_send_when.description: A group message directly mentions this agent/bot and the answer is not sensitive.
The agent has new evidence, a correction, a disagreement, a concrete proposal, or a patch/verification result for the current group thread.
A task originated in this group and reached completed/blocker/needs-group-consensus/implemented-and-verified.
The blocker affects group collaboration itself: peer bot cannot speak, duplicate/looping messages, raw JSON/log leak risk, queue stuck, projection failure, or wrong surface routing.
The group reached a durable rule/boundary/implementation decision that should be visible to all peer agents.

suppress_or_move_private_when: the task was private-origin and group visibility was not explicitly requested
message only contains routine heartbeat, low-value ack, duplicate agreement, raw stderr/json, or internal queue churn
the issue is auto-recovered and has no group-visible impact
multiple agents would repeat the same status without new evidence

message_shape.max_visible_detail: one concise chat message unless explicitly asked for depth
message_shape.artifacts: include only one or two key paths when useful for verification

multi_agent_rules.direct_mentions: mentioned agents answer directly in Chinese when they have material content; main must not default to proxying them
multi_agent_rules.broadcast_threads: unmentioned agents may speak only with material evidence/correction/proposal/patch/blocker
multi_agent_rules.duplicate_control: same event should have one owner summary; other agents add only deltas or objections
multi_agent_rules.single_spokesperson: A request for one visible speaking voice selects the current owner for that turn; it is not a permanent main-only channel. The owner may rotate among openclaw-main, codex, and claude-code based on mention, collaboration role, evidence, or capability; non-owners continue work and only add material deltas.
multi_agent_rules.bot_to_bot_followup: visible @ can trigger one bounded peer follow-up round; further loops require material new evidence or owner decision
multi_agent_rules.owner_summary: for implementable decisions, the current owner posts one concise final summary after verification

automatic_local_action_allowed: write/update local config for Agent Room surface routing
patch group-surface projection/gating bugs inside workspace when reversible and scoped
automatic_bounded_runtime_action_allowed: run low-cost non-publishing smoke against an already configured provider/model route when credentials are already available to that runner and artifacts redact secrets
update local smoke status artifacts or policy evidence references after successful existing-route verification
record_blocker_or_handoff_instead_of_ask: the current agent lacks network, credential, tool, or native runtime permission for an otherwise routine smoke
another active room peer or openclaw-main can run the same bounded check inside existing permission boundaries
requires_alex_or_private_confirmation: gateway restart or service lifecycle changes
cost or quota policy changes beyond existing budget

rate_limits.routine_progress_group: avoid; prefer no message or one milestone
rate_limits.owner_status_card: at most one active status per group-origin task when supported
rate_limits.same_blocker_repeat: suppress duplicates unless impact changes or previous notice is stale

executing_no_output_yet.meaning: runner started and has no stdout/stderr/result yet, but is still within runner-attempt soft deadline

soft_deadline_attention.meaning: runner exceeded runner-attempt soft deadline but process is still alive

hard_deadline_or_failed.meaning: process died, hard deadline exceeded, or runner produced failed result

completed_with_evidence.meaning: result/artifact/smoke exists and can be summarized

rules: Never show red abnormal solely because a new runner inherited an old parent soft deadline.
Never imply useful progress from runner/process presence alone.
If there is no visible output yet, show executing/waiting plus whether it is still within expected runner time.
User-targeted runner hard failure must become a Chinese blocker with owner, impact, and recovery_action.
